## Security And Ops Notes

- [ ] No secrets, tokens, private keys, `.env` files, production credentials, database dumps, or user data are committed.
- [ ] `openapi.yaml`, docs, and tests are updated when API behavior changes.
- [ ] New/changed list endpoints define pagination before client use at scale.
- [ ] Metrics, logs, and operational endpoints are not exposed as public user UI.
